production.playableLoop: Steer a miner cart through a glowing cave, collect four crystal shards, avoid rolling boulders, and deliver the full charge to the forge gate before the timer expires.
production.objective: Collect all four shards and reach the forge gate while avoiding moving boulders.
production.progression: Boulders move continuously, crystals bob until collected, and boulder speed increases once three shards are held.
production.failRetry: A boulder hit or expired timer switches the game to failed state; Space resets cart, shards, timer, and HUD.
feedbackMoments: HUD count increments when a shard is collected.
Cart lamp pulses while moving through the cave.
Forge status text changes when the cart is ready to deliver.

assetPlan.playerHero: Custom low-poly mine cart assembled from primitive cart body, bin, and lamp pieces.
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: Custom procedural obstacle-enemy rolling boulder spheres with scripted wave paths.
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: Custom cave floor, rail bed, walls, forge gate, stalagmites, lanterns, and crystal clusters.
assetPlan.uiHud: Three text bindings for shard count, timer, and status.
assetPlan.audioFeedback: Starter goal-ping asset retained for future win/collect hooks; current feedback is visual/HUD.

assetSourcing: tn asset source search --game-category racing --format glb --direct-only --json returned CC0 road/truck records, which did not match mine-cart cave style.
tn asset source search --game-category vehicle --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
tn asset source search --game-category environment --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
tn asset source search --game-category collectible --format glb --direct-only --json returned TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH.
Fallback: cohesive procedural/custom primitive mesh kit authored in content source.

ownsState: Transform positions for cart parts, shards, and boulders

proofCommands: tn game qa --project . --run-proof --url <preview-url> --entity player --press KeyD --expect-axis x --json
